arts.sum: Sunderland boss Regis Le Bris has confirmed that Dennis Cirkin is fit to return against Stoke City this… The post Regis Le Bris confirms welcome Sunderland injury boost ahead of Stoke City test appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Sunderland man reveals he’s already thinking about future – Hints it’s away from Black Cats
arts.sum: On summer deadline day, Sunderland allowed Pierre Ekwah to join AS Saint-Étienne on a loan deal with an option to buy. Towards the end of September, the 22-year-old said he didn’t hesitate to leave the Black Cats for the Ligue 1 side. The Sunderland owned player has given a lengthy interview to Le Progrès, discussing The post Sunderland man reveals he’s already thinking about future – Hints it’s away from Black Cats appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Tony Pulis on Arsenal corners, zonal marking and what he'd do as Stoke boss now
arts.sum: Set plays were particularly important - 81 out of the 188 in total that Stoke scored in the top flight under Pulis between 2008 and 2013 came from set pieces excluding penalties, a whopping 43.1 per cent, and they helped the Potters stay up and establish themselves back in the big time. All the teams I've been at, most have been good at set plays, which is such an important part of the game, as Arsenal are showing, and I think it's coming more into fashion now with people having set play coaches up and down the country.

arts.ttl: Stoke City transfer news latest as Leicester link hints at Tom Cannon January plan
arts.sum: There is an option, like in most loans, to recall Cannon in January but unless a suddenly prolific run of form forces Van Nistelrooy to think he could immediately be a Premier League game changer, the signs point to him staying at the bet365. He wanted regular game time and he's got that, scoring eight times so far in 16 league and cup appearances, nominated for November's Championship player of the month, winning a recall to the Republic of Ireland squad, and he seems happy under head coach Narcis Pelach.

arts.ttl: Arsenal aren't the new Stoke… they've just turned clever corners into a brutal ballet, writes OLIVER HOLT
arts.sum: OLIVER HOLT: At the core of it, for all the fascination of the ballet in the six-yard box, is the metronomic excellence of the delivery by the corner takers.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sunderland vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Sunderland and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: What the world is saying about Arsenal as Stoke City try to regain mantle
arts.sum: There were moments in Arsenal's set-piece-powered win over Manchester United that were spookily familiar to anyone who watched Stoke City under Tony Pulis as they fought to establish themselves in the Premier League. Arsenal have not suddenly turned into Stoke City under Tony Pulis - at the least, Arteta does not want any comparisons."
